customer_segment: Small B2B AI vendors selling pilots to enterprise buyers
pain: Enterprise procurement security questions delay pilots and create founder anxiety during sales.
offer: Fixed-price 48-hour AI security questionnaire readiness review.
revenue_hypothesis: Founders with active enterprise deals will pay for a fast review that reduces deal delay risk.
distribution_path: Warm founder network and direct messages to AI tool founders
pricing_guess: USD 200 for the first manual review
riskiest_assumption: Founders will pay for readiness help before the deal is formally blocked.
